guardrails: Use only evidence-backed claims from the supplied brief.
Do not claim active hiring or velocity without strong public job-post evidence.
Do not mention competitor or execution gaps unless the gap confidence clears the threshold.
Use question-led exploratory wording for AI readiness; ask rather than assert.
disallowed_claims: claiming verified bench fit when unknown
